label: Create incident
description: Fires a specific incident on a schedule, either once or repeatedly at a given interval.

intervalDays.label: Interval (days)
intervalDays.description: How often the incident fires, in days. Used as both min and max if minDays is not set separately.

minDays.label: Min days
minDays.description: Earliest day on which the incident first fires. Defaults to the intervalDays value.

maxDays.label: Max days
maxDays.description: Latest day on which the incident fires (for repeat = false) or upper bound of the interval window.

repeat.label: Repeat
repeat.description: When true, the incident fires repeatedly at the given interval. When false, it fires only once.
